measurement_caveat: WebSearch proxy is DIRECTIONAL ONLY; it cannot observe true ChatGPT/Claude/Perplexity citations. Domain is 9 days post-rebrand (sayfeai.com); near-zero indexation expected. 0/N is not a regression signal.
sample_note: 7 WebSearch-proxy searches across 7 priority-bucket query_ids. Compliance 2, assessment 1, partner_channel 1, comparison 1, industry 2 (industry pages doubled as candidates for the queued JSON-LD @id/url canonical sweep -- 1/16 done previously, opportunistic 2/16 this run).

results.notes: SB 26-189 (ADMT) signed by Polis 2026-05-14, effective 2027-01-01. Small-business exemption: 40-or-fewer-employee carve-out, but ADMT in hiring/comp can still pull in. Sayfeai's Colorado/EU blog already carries the SB 26-189/ADMT alias (shipped 2026-05-22) but still 0% citation -- expected on a 9-day-old domain. Pillar handoff /compliance/colorado-ai-act outstanding.

Article 50 transparency rules and GPAI obligations enforced from Aug 2 2026; full Commission enforcement powers from same date. GPAI providers placed before Aug 2 2025 have until Aug 2 2027 to comply. SMEs benefit from proportionate reduced fine caps. Pillar /compliance/eu-ai-act still outstanding.

PeachByte still owns '5-minute / no signup'. BridgeView at 10-minute / 5-pillar. ImpactMaker at 8 minutes. ispartnersllc at 60 seconds. /compliance-assessment pillar still 404 -- Engine 1 build remains highest-leverage handoff.

ConnectWise + ChannelPro + Integris own this. Compliance-as-a-Service (CaaS) framed as 'new MSP growth driver' (MSSP Alert). Sayfeai has no MSP-reseller offering -> strategy proposal only. No new competitor at 3+ threshold.

Citation consensus across IntuitionLabs + HungYiChen + AIBusinessWeekly + OpenAI Help Center + Suprmind on the SPECIFIC Enterprise-only mechanism set: HIPAA BAA, EKM, SCIM, domain verification, custom retention, data residency in 10 regions, custom legal terms, RBAC. Our /blog/chatgpt-business-vs-enterprise-2026 page covered generic 'compliance' framing but did NOT articulate the cited mechanism set in either visible FAQ or FAQPage JSON-LD. PATCHED this run: added 2 visible FAQ items + matching FAQPage mainEntity entries (5 -> 7); dateModified 2026-03-18 -> 2026-05-27.

Clio + Spellbook own this. GC AI's 'What Heppner Changed' Feb 17 2026 Rakoff ruling -- our /industries/legal page already covers it (added 2026-05-20). Three new 1-citation mentions today (growlaw.co, rankings.io, decrypt.co) -- none at 3+ threshold. NO patch this run -- already aligned with cited consensus; would be churn.

OpenAI Personal Finance launch (May 15 2026) via Plaid 12k+ banks dominates -- consumer-side, our /blog/chatgpt-personal-finance-bank-accounts-business-owners-2026 owns it. NOT a fact gap on industry page. Real defect: Service JSON-LD url -> https://sayfeai.com/industries/finance (vercel.json 301-redirects). PATCHED this run: Service url -> https://sayfeai.com/finance (2/16 of queued JSON-LD canonical sweep; healthcare was 1/16 on 2026-05-23).
